channel.title: 240sx on Codin Moldovanu
channel.description: Recent content in 240sx on Codin Moldovanu

item.title: Cars
item.description: Unlike a lot of fellows in other places, my dad didn’t have a ’70 Plymouth Cuda with a .426inch Hemi engine that was just waiting to be restored that inspired my love for cars, instead my father like most of the fathers in my generation drove communist era cars followed by older european cars after the so called democracy set it. I tend to believe the petrol in my blood comes from my mother whom loved the ’79 Civics (EB series, the first generation of Civics) so much that she and my father actually owned two of them.
